description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the elixir:1.3.2 Docker image with a postgres:9.5.3 service and defines the ROCKBOOKS_DB_HOST variable as postgres. Include a before_script that runs mix local.rebar --force, mix local.hex --force, and mix deps.get. Add a test job in the default test stage that runs mix coveralls.json and then uploads the coverage to Codecov with bash <(curl -s https://codecov.io/bash) -t 78abf403-9490-455c-9be9-e60cede9f22a.
